The '''Flurry II combat cloud car''' was an aerial vehicle manufactured by [[Bespin Motors/Legends|Bespin Motors]].<ref name="Bartyn's Landing" />

Produced in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], it was a brand-new model at the time. The [[Outer Rim Oreworks Company|Outer Rim Oreworks]] provided its [[Security Chief (ORO)|security chief]] of [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]] with a shiny, bronze-colored Flurry II that he named "[[Brassie]]." In time, "Brassie" became battered and no longer shiny.<ref name="Bartyn's Landing" />
